transformations.name: cenetegarisk_enrollment_IngestFilter
transformations.condition: batch_id_src_1 = max_batch_id AND (corrupt_record_src_1 IS NULL OR corrupt_record_src_1 = '')

derived_fields.name: location
derived_fields.expression: CASE WHEN MEMBER_CITY_src_1 IS NULL AND MEMBER_STATE_src_1 IS NULL AND MEMBER_ZIP_src_1 IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT_WS(' ', CONCAT_WS(', ', MEMBER_CITY_src_1, MEMBER_STATE_src_1), MEMBER_ZIP_src_1) END

derived_fields.name: is_current_flag
derived_fields.expression: CASE WHEN MEMBER_ACTIVE_IND_src_1 IN ('Y', '1') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END

derived_fields.name: is_zip4
derived_fields.expression: CASE WHEN parsed_addr_zip4 IS NOT NULL AND parsed_addr_zip4 <> '' THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END

derived_fields.name: is_current_flag
derived_fields.expression: CASE WHEN MEMBER_ACTIVE_IND_src_1 IN ('Y', '1') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END

derived_fields.expression: CASE WHEN MEMBER_ACTIVE_IND_src_1 IN ('Y', '1') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END
